name: Dom Deluise's Outrageous Yum Yum Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift flour, baking powder, and baking soda onto wax paper. Butter and flour two 9-inch cake pans. In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar and egg until dissolved. Add butter and mix into egg mixture. Add sour cream, water, and vanilla; beat again. Add flour mixture and cocoa; beat slowly until flour is absorbed. Do not overbeat. Fold in chocolate pieces.
Divide mixture among prepared pans. Bake 35-40 minutes or until tested done. Cool cakes on wire racks for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and cool completely. Frost.
CHOCOLATE BUTTER ICING: In a small saucepan, melt chocolate chips in the coffee over very low heat. Remove pan from heat. Beat in butter, 1 tablespoon at a time, until smooth. Set pan in bowl of ice and beat until icing is spreadable and holds its shape.
